text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a race today. I go to watch, and see that
there's some commotion on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and another runner are talking
about something...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's just you and me! I'm not gonna go easy on
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Well, it seems like she's been in a slump
recently.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I told her she should just think about beating me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm gonna lose, though! Throw a few
cheers our way if ya feel like it. See ya!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Hishiama! I'm definitely going to win!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the right attitude! All right, we're going to
do this for real!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (Huh... She's running pretty well now.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(Now to break out from the back of the pack and
get on her heels... Let's go!)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've got a long way to go before you can block
the great Hishiama! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: No way! She passed me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon! Hishi Amazon has taken first place!
She made a comeback in the last half of the race
and took the lead! What a surprising victory!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It was barely a workout!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...You crushed me. But, thanks to your advice,
I've managed to break free from my slump!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Glad to hear it. You were tearing up the track out
there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
From now on, if you ever hit a wall like that, just
run right through it without a second thought!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Your path will become clear!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I will!
